news.summary: Expert in biogerontology, Dr. Aubrey de Grey, will oversee tailored scientific content at the prominent longevity conference, showcasing cutting-edge research and real-world implications. With a focus on practical applications, the conference, known as RAADfest, stands as the top event in longevity for a wide audience. Dr. de Grey's involvement ensures the fusion of pioneering research and actionable insights, making the event a must-attend for enthusiasts.
news.headline: Dr. Aubrey de Grey to curate scientific programming at RAADfest 2025, leading longevity conference.

news.summary: In Toronto, the ongoing WSIB strike has reached a crucial stage with over 3,600 frontline workers represented by OCEU/CUPE 1750 off the job for over two months. Recently, President Harry Goslin had a conversation with Premier Doug Ford regarding the labor dispute. This marked a significant milestone in the conflict. During the call, President Goslin highlighted the union's primary issues such as wages, excessive workloads, and the outsourcing of 26 positions in Ontario.
news.headline: Premier Ford spoke with OCEU President amid WSIB strike; over 3,600 frontline workers off for 2 months.

news.summary: A new coworking space at 3101 Wilson Blvd, Suite 500 in Arlington, VA, has been launched by Carr Workplaces, a prominent provider of flexible office solutions. With a modern design and vibrant atmosphere, the space aims to cater to the needs of professionals in the area. This grand opening marks a significant expansion for Carr Workplaces in the region.
news.headline: Carr Workplaces opens new Clarendon location at 3101 Wilson Blvd, VA, offering flexible office solutions.

news.summary: A resident of Oshawa, Ontario, Canada, expressed their innovation to enhance ladder safety by introducing the FIRST STEP LAST STEP kit, applicable to various ladder models. This inventor's goal was to ensure increased safety, confidence, and peace of mind for users. The kit is designed to be compatible with all types of ladders, marking a significant advancement in ladder safety technology. The inventor's creation is set to revolutionize ladder safety measures, impacting users across various industries.
news.headline: Inventor from Oshawa, Canada, creates FIRST STEP LAST STEP safety kit for ladders. Offers enhanced safety and confidence.

news.summary: In Lexington, Kentucky, local fiber internet provider Kinetic has confirmed its sponsorship of the post-game fireworks display taking place after the July 5 match between the Lexington Legends and the Southern Maryland Blue Crabs. news.summary: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, Venture Global, recently revealed the completion of a significant financial transaction. The company closed a whopping $4 billion Senior Secured Notes offering through its subsidiary, Venture Global Plaquemines LNG, LLC.
news.headline: Venture Global closes $4B senior secured notes issued by Plaquemines LNG, LLC, based in Virginia.

news.summary: Webull Corporation (Nasdaq: BULL) based in St. Petersburg, Florida, has revealed plans to strategically utilize capital for significant growth endeavors. As the owner of the Webull online investment platform, the company aims to enhance its operations through targeted investments. This announcement was made on July 3, 2025.
news.headline: Webull secures $1 billion equity agreement for growth initiatives. Nasdaq: BULL. St. Petersburg, July 3, 2025.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a prominent derivatives and securities exchange network, released its trading volume data for June. The company announced statistics encompassing its various business lines worldwide. Additionally, Cboe provided insights into selected revenue per contract and net revenue figures for the period.
news.headline: Cboe Global Markets reports June 2025 trading volume statistics, includes guidance on revenue per contract.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025 in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Warren, Ontario, Canada shared insights on their innovative approach to log home construction. This individual, working in log home restoration, believed there was room for improvement in the sector. As a result, they created the ULTIMATE LOG HOME, introducing a superior and environmentally friendly design. This invention is anticipated to revolutionize the log home building industry with its unique features and functionality.
news.headline: Inventor from Ontario creates ULTIMATE LOG HOME with new eco-friendly material for construction.

Liverpool footballer Diogo Jota and his brother, Andre Silva, were killed in a single-car crash near Zamora, Spain, police said Thursday. Jota, a Portuguese international, was 28. Silva was 26.

news.summary: Senator Cynthia Lummis (R-WY) recently introduced a comprehensive digital asset tax reform bill with the aim of modernizing the taxation of cryptocurrencies in the United States. The bill, unveiled on July 3rd, addresses various longstanding tax issues within the crypto industry. Key provisions include a $300 de minimis exemption for small transactions, a more practical approach to taxing mining and staking activities, and achieving parity between digital assets and traditional financial instruments. Lummis emphasized the importance of adapting the tax code to support the digital economy without imposing undue burdens on digital asset users. The bill is stated to be fully funded and is intended to streamline taxation processes for these assets.
news.headline: Senator Cynthia Lummis introduces a digital asset tax reform bill, offering a $300 de minimis exemption for small transactions and clarifying tax treatment for mining and staking. The legislation aims to modernize crypto taxation in the US.

news.summary: U.S. stock markets experienced significant gains on Thursday, reaching new all-time highs following positive labor market statistics just before the July 4 holiday. The S&P 500 was approaching 6,300 points, the Nasdaq 100 rose to 22,860 points, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average neared 44,900 points - close to its peak in January. Small caps also joined the upward trend, with the Russell 2000 increasing by almost 1%. Investor confidence was boosted by the June nonfarm payrolls report, which revealed the addition of 147,000 jobs to the U.S. economy, surpassing expectations of 110,000 jobs. This data helped alleviate concerns raised by a weak private payroll report released the previous day. Particularly, tech stocks excelled, with the combined market capitalization of the "Magnificent Seven" hitting $18.1 trillion. NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) notably...
news.headline: Wall Street hits new highs on strong labor data ahead of July 4. S&P 500 approaching 6,300, Nasdaq 100 at 22,860, Dow Jones near 44,900. Magnificent Seven tech stocks top $18 trillion market cap. Nonfarm payrolls show U.S. added 147,000 jobs in June.

news.summary: Following a recent policy change by Singapore's Monetary Authority, all cryptocurrency firms operating in the country are mandated to register. This new requirement led to the granting of a license to operate in Singapore.
news.headline: Bitstamp received a license from MAS to operate in Singapore following a new policy requiring all crypto firms in the country to register.
